description: A maritime democracy built on trade and civic debate.

leader.trait: Pragmatic and visionary, she has reformed the constitution twice in ten years.

description: An ancient mountain kingdom where millennial traditions coexist with late industrialisation.

leader.trait: Conservative yet clear-eyed, he knows his reign may be the last of the line.

description: A federal archipelago where each island has forged fierce autonomy and a formidable merchant fleet.

leader.trait: Born on a cargo ship, she governs as she sails: reading currents before charts.
